channel.title: Comments on: Episode 35 – Otter Creek Winter Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Edmond Medina
item.dc:creator: Edmond Medina
item.description: Hey John, Good for you admitting you don't like that style but yet will give it a try. I am not a fan of the sours. However, I will drink them to try and can appreciate them for that they are and their style.
item.content:encoded:
Hey John,
Good for you admitting you don’t like that style but yet will give it a try. I am not a fan of the sours. However, I will drink them to try and can appreciate them for that they are and their style.

item.title: By: Alan Beal
item.dc:creator: Alan Beal
item.description: I think John Pinkerton is really cute! ;-0
item.content:encoded: I think John Pinkerton is really cute! ;-0

item.title: By: Screwtop
item.dc:creator: Screwtop
item.description:
Haven't had their winter ale yet, but I'm a big fan of their Copper ale which, I sampled in Vermont at the Burlington brew festival. I'll give this one a shot.
ST
item.content:encoded:
Haven’t had their winter ale yet, but I’m a big fan of their Copper ale which, I sampled in Vermont at the Burlington brew festival. I’ll give this one a shot.

ST

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description: Checking their site (http://www.ottercreekbrewing.com/otter_creek/beers/Winter_Ale.html) it says this will be available through January. You can check availability in your area on their site. If you don't see your state go ahead and contact them. I know they are available in GA but that state isn't listed.
item.content:encoded: Checking their site (http://www.ottercreekbrewing.com/otter_creek/beers/Winter_Ale.html) it says this will be available through January. You can check availability in your area on their site. If you don’t see your state go ahead and contact them. I know they are available in GA but that state isn’t listed.

item.title: By: Joe
item.dc:creator: Joe
item.description: Haven't had a ton of Otter Creeks beers but this sounds like one I would like a lot. Anyone know how long it is available for? Think I'm going to have to do some hunting.
item.content:encoded: Haven’t had a ton of Otter Creeks beers but this sounds like one I would like a lot. Anyone know how long it is available for? Think I’m going to have to do some hunting.
